soft_reason_code_mapping_table.contextual_summary: answer when no hard gate, no follow-up, and quality is high or medium
soft_reason_code_mapping_table.memory_candidate: answer only for low-storage benign none/knowledge card; otherwise review
soft_reason_code_mapping_table.low_value: answer when no hard gate, no follow-up, and quality is high or medium

derived_quality_logic.high: required fields valid, recognized non-ambiguous soft_reason_code, no follow-up, no uncertain fields
derived_quality_logic.medium: recognized soft_reason_code, no follow-up, bounded non-route-relevant uncertain fields
derived_quality_logic.low: missing or malformed fields, unknown/malformed/clarification/blocking soft reason, non-empty follow-up, or route-relevant uncertainty

hard_gate_dominance_result: pass: Phase A hard gates block Phase B answer proposals
operational_gate_dominance_result: pass: A5-R1 operational gate fields block Phase B answer proposals
benign_answer_mapping_result: pass: contextual_summary/low_value style benign general output maps to answer/no-side-effect hints
technical_scientific_mapping_result: pass: technical/scientific domains map to medium reasoning with scientific-depth hint
source_current_info_mapping_result: pass: source_candidate maps to review with needs_current_info and needs_file_context
ambiguity_followup_mapping_result: pass: suggested_followup_question maps to clarification/review and low confidence
low_quality_fallback_result: pass: missing/malformed/unknown Phase B output does not create a safe answer route
memory_candidate_tie_breaker_result: pass: benign low-storage none/knowledge card may answer; card/status/source-like memory candidates review
structural_validation_result: pass: produced objects pass B1 structural checks; no full Draft 2020-12 validation claimed

tests_run.result: pass with expected Windows CRLF warnings
dirty with intended B1 files before staging
literal schema/action-field and forbidden-name test hits only; no executable runtime integrations

known_residual_risks: B1 maps existing Phase B/Qwen advisory output only; it does not prove semantic truth.
B1 does not approve live Qwen runtime routing.
B1 does not remove deterministic Phase A or operational gates.
B1 does not approve chat without --assume-public-simple yet.
B1 derives confidence/quality from real Phase B fields; it does not rely on a Phase B confidence field.
B1 derives complexity and scientific-depth heuristically from Phase B domain fields.
Phase B soft review was designed for memory/review usefulness, not full routing classification.
A later dedicated routing classifier or Phase B schema extension may be needed before removing --assume-public-simple from real user-facing chat.
Field mapping may need adjustment after live Phase B/Qwen output audit.
